papers.title: Staged Depth-Pruning Distillation of a Flow-Matching Text-to-Speech Teacher: A Compact Hindi Speech Synthesizer
papers.abstract: A practical recipe for building a compact Hindi TTS model by distilling a 337M-parameter flow-matching teacher (IndicF5) under a ~17.6-hour data budget. Using staged depth pruning from 22→16→12→8→6 transformer blocks with WER-gated fine-tuning, the students reach WER 0.00 at 249M and 190M params. The 131M model remains robust; at 102M a capacity cliff is observed. The method yields a high-quality Hindi voice running in real-time on a 6GB laptop GPU.
papers.highlight: 🎯 仅用17.6小时数据将337M TTS教师模型蒸馏至131M学生模型，WER=0.00，6GB笔记本GPU实时运行

papers.title: Caption Studio: Transparent-first Speech and Audio Intelligence Platform
papers.abstract: A transparency-first speech and audio intelligence platform that transforms spoken audio/video into structured, searchable content via ASR (Whisper-class), speaker diarization (pyannote), waveform analysis, pitch, speaking rate, silence, filler-word frequency, and sentiment extraction. Key contribution: every metric is explicitly labeled as measured/derived/unavailable for traceability.
papers.highlight: 🔍 透明优先的语音智能平台，每个指标明确标注来源（实测/推导/不可用），提升可解释性

papers.title: A Unified Embedding Space for Text, Image, Video, and Audio
papers.abstract: Fusion Embedding family adds audio to a frozen vision-language embedding base. Gen 1 trains only a 16.4M connector between frozen audio tower and frozen base; Gen 2 adds modality-gated deep adapters (44.2M). Aligning audio to text alone makes audio-image retrieval emerge with zero paired audio-visual data. Trains in hours on a single GPU. Weights and code open-sourced.
papers.highlight: 🌐 首次将音频加入四模态统一嵌入空间，零音频-图像配对数据即实现跨模态检索，单GPU训练

papers.title: Towards Array-Invariant Speech Enhancement via Geometry-Aware Dynamic Convolution
papers.abstract: A Geometry-Aware Dynamic Convolution (Geo-DConv) framework that leverages microphone coordinates to transform standard fixed-array SE models into robust array-invariant systems. Evaluated on RealMAN multi-channel speech dataset. Accepted at Interspeech 2026.
papers.highlight: 🏆 Interspeech 2026 录用：利用麦克风几何坐标实现阵列不变语音增强

papers.title: Summary of DCASE 2026 Task 5: Audio-Dependent Question Answering (ADQA)
papers.authors: Haolin He, Qiuqiang Kong et al.
papers.abstract: DCASE 2026 Task 5 introduces ADQA, testing whether audio-language models answer from audio rather than textual priors. 3000 items across music, speech, and environmental audio. 14 teams, 36 submissions. Top accuracy 58.33% (MOSS-Audio-8B-Thinking + Qwen3-Omni-30B ensemble). Most common backbone: MOSS-Audio-8B-Thinking (13/36). Evaluation accuracy drops 11.9pp on avg vs dev set.
papers.highlight: 📊 DCASE 2026 音频QA挑战赛结果公布：最佳准确率58.33%，揭示音频语言模型仍严重依赖文本先验

papers.title: End-to-End Markov State Sequence Learning for Auditory Attention Decoding
papers.abstract: An end-to-end Markov AAD framework based on CRF that jointly optimizes window-level neural emissions with a two-state attention prior. Introduces ESCNet backbone. Achieves 86.5% causal and 92.4% non-causal accuracy with 1s windows on AVGC dataset. Improves causal decoding by 5.6% and 2.0% on KUL and USTC datasets over post-hoc HMM.
papers.highlight: 🧠 端到端马尔可夫听觉注意力解码：1秒窗口达92.4%准确率，助听器应用新突破

papers.title: Chaos-Inspired Samba-Based EMG-To-Speech Synthesis with Nonlinear Chaotic Losses
papers.abstract: CS-ETS: A chaos-inspired EMG-to-speech synthesis architecture combining Samba encoder with Lyapunov Exponent Regularization and Multi-Scale Detrended Fluctuation Analysis losses. 40.79% fewer parameters (32M vs 54.1M), 2.1x LSD improvement, 4.7x STOI and 1.25x SI-SDR gains through Post-Vocoder Alignment.
papers.highlight: ⚡ 混沌物理启发的肌电-语音合成：参数量减少41%，质量提升2-5倍

papers.title: Addressing Limited Data in Auditory Attention Decoding with Diffusion Generative Models
papers.abstract: Investigates diffusion probabilistic models for generating synthetic speech-evoked EEG data to address data scarcity in AAD. Synthetic data significantly improves AAD performance over models trained solely on measured EEG (p<0.05), showing potential for improving short-window AAD models in hearing aid applications.
papers.highlight: 🎲 扩散模型生成合成EEG数据，显著提升听觉注意力解码（p<0.05），助听器数据增强新方向
